events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana covering Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Currently in activity planning and shopping phase.
events.hook: Plan remaining activities in Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. Research eyeglasses stores in Kyoto and validate prescription requirements for purchasing 4 pairs.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
